rss.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
rss.snippet: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

rss.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
rss.snippet: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

rss.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
rss.snippet: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

arxiv_papers.title: Security Considerations for Artificial Intelligence Agents
arxiv_papers.snippet: This article, a lightly adapted version of Perplexity's response to NIST/CAISI Request for Information 2025-0035, details our observations and recommendations concerning the security of frontier AI agents. These insights are informed by Perplexity's experience operating general-purpose agentic syste

arxiv_papers.title: The Artificial Self: Characterising the landscape of AI identity
arxiv_papers.snippet: Many assumptions that underpin human concepts of identity do not hold for machine minds that can be copied, edited, or simulated. We argue that there exist many different coherent identity boundaries (e.g.\ instance, model, persona), and that these imply different incentives, risks, and cooperation
